summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of VIP Hub rebrand. All 9 features tested and passed. VIP page correctly displays NoToGreed VIP CLUB branding, 4 VIP tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond), casino selection modal, lottery section with registration requirement, and How It Works section.
passed_tests: VIP page shows 'NoToGreed VIP CLUB' branding
4 VIP tiers displayed: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond
Each tier shows benefits (cashback %, lottery entries, support level) and requirements
REDEEM VIP ACCESS buttons present on all 4 tiers and clickable
Modal opens when clicking REDEEM VIP ACCESS button
Modal shows 'Which casino do you prefer to connect your boost to?' text
Modal displays all 5 partner casinos (Stake.com, BC.Game, Shuffle.com, Roobet, Rollbit) with their bonuses
Lottery shows 'Registration Required' message for non-logged users
How NoToGreed VIP Works section displays 3 steps (Register, Connect Casino, Play & Earn)
Modal closes when clicking X button or overlay
Modal title changes based on selected tier (Bronze/Silver/Gold/Diamond VIP Access)
critical_code_review_comments: VIPHub.js uses proper data-testid attributes for all tiers and modal components - excellent for testing
API calls use REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from environment - correct implementation
Modal correctly displays tier-specific styling (gradient colors match tier)
Lottery section properly checks localStorage for authentication status
All 5 partner casinos displayed with bonus values and exclusive extras
seed_data_creation: None - using existing VIP campaigns from backend
context_for_next_testing_agent: VIP Hub has been rebranded to NoToGreed VIP CLUB. Features 4 VIP tiers (Bronze, Silver, Gold, Diamond) with REDEEM VIP ACCESS buttons that open a modal asking 'Which casino do you prefer to connect your boost to?' and showing 5 partner casinos. Lottery section requires registration (shows 'Registration Required' for non-logged users). How It Works section shows 3 steps. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented: tier-{bronze|silver|gold|diamond}, redeem-{bronze|silver|gold|diamond}, casino-modal, casino-modal-overlay, modal-close, modal-casino-{slug}.
